data.body: STACK PUSHED complete: 926(97f2) GREEN, 927(aff0) GREEN, 931(625b ps3) GREEN, 935(eefd ps2) Verified-OK/LLM-pending, 936(21ca) gates running. Gate poller armed. LANDING PLAN: once all 5 green -> submit top (936) which submits the whole chain -> 625b merges. Then fetch+ff worktree to advanced main, close 97f2/aff0/625b/eefd/21ca bottom-up (all Verified+1 & merged-reachable). Then ad44 blocker(625b closed) clears -> review-plan ad44 --ref origin/main, claim, implement (analog of 625b: canonical map_remote_to_local in reconcile_check, assignee_identity membership, sanitize_description, canonical status/priority; jira_value stays raw; drop _load_outbound_fields/_load_adf; extend AST gate to reconcile_check.py, remove carve-out), green, land, close. Then close epic bbf1.
